title: MAC340DR5 nominal cooling capacity
summary: Nominal cooling capacity 100 kW, heating 100 kW, cooling input power 29.6 kW, heating input power 29.9 kW, COP 3.38, energy efficiency level 2.
evidence_quote:
机组型号  MAC340DR5 MAC450DR5 MAC450D5
名义制冷量 kW 100 130 135

title: MAC450DR5 nominal cooling capacity
summary: Nominal cooling capacity 130 kW, heating 130 kW, cooling input power 39 kW, heating input power 39.8 kW, COP 3.33, energy efficiency level 2.
evidence_quote:
机组型号  MAC340DR5 MAC450DR5 MAC450D5
名义制冷量 kW 100 130 135

title: MAC450D5 nominal cooling capacity
summary: Nominal cooling capacity 135 kW, cooling input power 40.3 kW, COP 3.35, energy efficiency level 2, no heating.
evidence_quote:
机组型号  MAC340DR5 MAC450DR5 MAC450D5
名义制冷量 kW 100 130 135

title: MAC340DR5 nominal water flow rate
summary: Nominal cooling water flow 17.2 m³/h, heating water flow 17.2 m³/h, water pressure drop 42 kPa.

title: MAC450DR5 nominal water flow rate
summary: Nominal cooling water flow 22.4 m³/h, heating water flow 22.4 m³/h, water pressure drop 56 kPa.

title: MAC450D5 nominal water flow rate
summary: Nominal cooling water flow 23.2 m³/h, water pressure drop 56 kPa.

title: MAC340DR5 power supply and compressor quantity
summary: Power supply 380V/3N~/50Hz, 3 scroll compressors, 2 axial fans.
evidence_quote:
电源 - 380V/3N~/50Hz
类型 - 全封闭涡旋压缩机  压缩机
数量 台 3 4

title: MAC450DR5/D5 compressor quantity
summary: MAC450DR5 and MAC450D5 have 4 scroll compressors.

title: Fan input power MAC340DR5
summary: Fan input power high/low: 1.4+1.25/1.16+0.7 kW.

title: Fan input power MAC450DR5/D5
summary: Fan input power high/low: 1.40x2/1.16x2 kW.

title: Maximum inlet/outlet water temperature difference
summary: Design maximum inlet/outlet water temperature difference is 7°C.

title: Unit dimensions
summary: Dimensions (L×W×H) 2100×1100×2300 mm for all models.
evidence_quote: 外形尺寸 长×宽×高 mm 2100x1100x2300

title: Operating weight MAC340DR5
summary: Operating weight 880 kg, total weight 870 kg.

title: Operating weight MAC450DR5
summary: Operating weight 1000 kg, total weight 990 kg.

title: Operating weight MAC450D5
summary: Operating weight 950 kg, total weight 940 kg.

title: Water connection size
summary: Inlet/outlet water connection size Rc 2 1/2.
evidence_quote: 机组进出水管接管尺寸  Rc 2 1/2

title: Operating range cooling
summary: Cooling operation: outdoor temperature 5~48°C, leaving water temperature 5~20°C. Gray area (ambient <15°C and LWT <7°C) is restricted.
evidence_quote: 制冷运行范围左下角灰色区域：环境温度小于 15℃且出水温度小于 7℃，机组在此区域运行时会受到限制

title: Operating range heating
summary: Heating operation: outdoor temperature -15~30°C, leaving water temperature 30~55°C.

title: Power supply voltage tolerance
summary: Power supply voltage within ±10% of rated voltage.
evidence_quote: 电源电压 额定电压的± 10%以内

title: Power supply frequency tolerance
summary: Power supply frequency fluctuation within ±1% of rated frequency.
evidence_quote: 电源频率 电网频率波动范围为额定频率的± 1％

title: Phase voltage imbalance limit
summary: Voltage difference between any two phases must be less than 2% of rated voltage.
evidence_quote: 各相之间不平衡  电源任意两相之间电压差值须小于额定电压的 2％

title: Chilled water flow rate tolerance
summary: Chilled water flow rate within ±30% of nominal flow.
evidence_quote: 冷冻水的流量  名义水流量的± 30%以内

title: Chilled water velocity range
summary: Chilled water velocity 0.5~2.0 m/s.

title: Chilled water pressure limit
summary: Chilled water pressure below 1 MPa.
evidence_quote: 冷冻水的水压  1MPa 以下

title: Ambient relative humidity limit
summary: Relative humidity below 90%.

title: Minimum power cable size MAC340DR5
summary: Main line 25 mm², neutral 16 mm², ground 16 mm², max running current 76.2 A, max input power 41.4 kW.

title: Minimum power cable size MAC450DR5
summary: Main line 35 mm², neutral 25 mm², ground 16 mm², max running current 99.8 A, max input power 54.0 kW.

title: Minimum power cable size MAC450D5
summary: Main line 35 mm², neutral 25 mm², ground 16 mm², max running current 103.1 A, max input power 55.8 kW.

title: Controller setpoint range cooling
summary: Cooling inlet water temperature setpoint range 10~25°C.
evidence_quote: 风冷冷水机组进水温度设置范围：制冷 10℃～25℃

title: Controller setpoint range heating
summary: Heating inlet water temperature setpoint range 25~50°C.

title: Fault code ER20: System 1 high pressure
summary: System 1 high pressure fault. Possible causes: motor damage, air short circuit, dirty heat exchanger, clogged filter, high water temperature, low water flow, dirty water filter, high ambient, overcharge, module output fault, pressure switch damage.

title: Fault code ER21: System 1 low pressure
summary: System 1 low pressure fault. Possible causes: poor heat exchange in heating, abnormal motor, refrigerant leak/insufficient, module input fault, pressure sensor damage.

title: Fault code ER25: Freeze protection
summary: Freeze protection fault. Possible causes: return water temperature set too low, low water flow causing large temperature difference.

title: Fault code ER19: Insufficient water flow
summary: Water flow insufficient fault. Possible causes: undersized pump, clogged filter, air in system, clogged/damaged differential pressure switch, excessive system pressure drop, other blockages.

title: Fault code ER33: System 1 discharge temperature too high
summary: System 1 discharge temperature too high. Possible causes: fan motor damage, air short circuit, dirty heat exchanger, EEV not opening, high water temperature, refrigerant leak/insufficient, incomplete defrost.

structured_payload.description: 系统1排气温度过高故障

evidence_quote: ER33 系统1排气温度过高故障

title: Fault code ER16: System 1 compressor 1 overload
summary: System 1 compressor 1 overload. Compressor running current too high, overload protector activated.
evidence_quote: ER16 系统1压缩机1过载故障

title: Fault code ER18: Water pump overload
summary: Water pump overload. Pump running current too high, overload protector activated.

title: Fault code ER27: Ambient temperature too high/low
summary: Ambient temperature too high or too low. Possible causes: sensor damage, actual ambient out of range.

structured_payload.description: 环境温度过高过低故障

evidence_quote: ER27 环境温度过高过低故障

title: Fault code ER65: Inlet/outlet water temperature difference too large
summary: Inlet/outlet water temperature difference too large. Possible causes: low water flow, TH6/TH7 disconnected, control module fault.
evidence_quote: ER65 进出水温差过大故障

title: Fault code ER66: Inlet/outlet water temperature sensors reversed
summary: Inlet/outlet water temperature sensors reversed. Possible causes: TH6/TH7 swapped or disconnected, control module fault.
evidence_quote: ER66 进出水温传感器接反

title: Fault code ERRO: DIP switch setting error
summary: DIP switch setting error on module. Re-set according to wiring diagram.
